start_greeting:
Hi. Ask me anything — I reply through Claude.
Commands: /new — start a fresh Claude Code session.
new_session_confirmation: Fresh Claude Code session started. Context cleared.
error_internal: Internal error: {error}. See logs for details.
agent_timeout: ⌛ Agent did not respond in {seconds}s. Try /new and retry.
unauthorized_callback: This button is for a different chat.
permission_request_default_title: Claude wants to use the «{tool}» tool.
default_system_prompt: You are a friendly Telegram assistant. Reply concisely.
access_denied:
🔒 Access to this bot is restricted.

Your Telegram chat ID: `{chat_id}`

Forward it to the bot administrator — they will add it to `allowed_chat_ids` in `config.json`, after which you'll be able to chat with the bot.
voice_disabled: 🎙 Voice transcription is not configured: groq_api_key is missing.
voice_empty: 🎙 Could not detect any speech in the audio.
